emails.subject: Various
emails.body: Various Richard, I think I am starting to obsess and I really don't want you guys working on this; however, it think that it is very odd that this Griffin guy over an eight week process, two registered letters and a phone conversation does not send a letter or bring up this "Chrome Dreams" issue from 1986 with us until this lawsuit is filed without our knowledge. This guys sounds a little off. Regards Delainey

emails.subject: Re: Various
emails.body: Re: Various 4 things: 1. You are right ---something is off about this guy. His behavior is irrational. 2. You are right--- you are obsessing about this too much. Relax and go back on vacation. 3. I handle personal matters for people all the time. This one is pretty minor. If it becomes more involved, we can talk about it then. 4. Relax and go back on vacation. I will talk to you on Tues. David W Delainey 07/13/2000 08:53 PM
